---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What would you like to add or improve?

## Use Case

Who benefits from this, and what workflow does it support?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior, command, setting, or UI change.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there simpler or existing ways to solve this?

## Additional Context

Add sketches, examples, sample data, or references if useful.
